label: pyNIF Export — LOD + Collision (Fallout 4 Static/WorldSpace)

materials.note: Do not rename/remove material slots — BGSM references stay intact

workflow: Duplicate mesh 3x → Mesh_LOD0, Mesh_LOD1, Mesh_LOD2, Mesh_LOD3
Add Decimate modifier: LOD1=0.6, LOD2=0.3, LOD3=0.1 → Apply
Rename LOD3 to Mesh_Collision, remove its materials
In pyNIF: mark Mesh_Collision as collision-only (no render)
Export → NIF with collision shape attached
